title: block-api hardcodes PROJECT_DIR; config.root unconsumed by readers + writers
body:
Forcing context: commit 53ebe39 landed /project install which writes declared schemas + starter blocks to <config.root>/... per .project/config.json. Block-api however still hardcodes PROJECT_DIR ('.project') in every read/write entrypoint. Until block-api honors config.root, the install mechanism delivers files to a directory the rest of the runtime cannot see — relocation feature is structurally inert and the install command writes to a directory readBlock/writeBlock/appendToBlock ignore.

Retrofit surface (file:line enumeration from intelligence dump):
  - packages/pi-context/src/block-api.ts:35 blockFilePath
  - packages/pi-context/src/block-api.ts:39 blockSchemaPath
  - packages/pi-context/src/block-api.ts:473 readBlockDir subdir construction
  - packages/pi-context/src/block-validation.ts:62, 69, 147, 219 snapshot/restore paths
  - packages/pi-context/src/index.ts:128, 273 (handleAddWork schemasDir lookup, additional handler path)
  - packages/pi-context/src/index.ts:installProject schema/block destination paths
  - packages/pi-context/src/project-sdk.ts:24, 43, 60, 128, 197, plus substrate-section paths
  - packages/pi-context/src/project-dir.ts: projectDir/schemasDir/schemaPath/agentsDir/projectTemplatesDir helpers (used by pi-jit-agents agent-spec.ts:10,224, compile.ts:17,116,183,228, template.ts:21,41)

pi-workflows + pi-behavior-monitors do NOT directly read .project/ — they consume readBlock/validateFromFile from pi-project, so retrofit at the pi-project layer covers their runtime as well. pi-jit-agents IS a direct consumer of project-dir.ts path helpers and needs the import migration.

Proposed resolution shape: extract substrate functions (loadConfig, loadRelations, getProjectContext, etc.) plus a new projectRoot(cwd) helper into a new module packages/pi-context/src/project-context.ts. project-context.ts depends only on project-dir.ts (constants), schema-validator.ts, and node builtins — block-api.ts can import projectRoot without creating a cycle. The path helpers (projectDir, schemasDir, schemaPath, agentsDir, projectTemplatesDir) move to project-context.ts in their context-aware form (composing projectRoot). project-dir.ts reduces to bare PROJECT_DIR + SCHEMAS_DIR constants. project-sdk.ts re-exports the substrate names for backward compat (zero consumer-side break for existing imports from @davidorex/pi-context/project-sdk).

Bootstrap exemption: initProject continues using PROJECT_DIR directly because it operates BEFORE config.json exists (it creates .project/ + writes the minimal config bootstrap). config.root is a forward declaration consumed by every other code path.

Back-compat: existing projects (no config.json, OR config.root='.project') behave byte-identically. Behavior changes only for users who explicitly set config.root to a custom path.
resolved_by: Resolved in commit 2b42760 — feat(pi-project): block-api PROJECT_DIR retrofit. project-context.ts module extracted, projectRoot resolver threaded through block-api / block-validation / project-sdk / index.ts, plus pi-jit-agents and pi-workflows imports repointed. 14 new tests verify config.root behavior + back-compat. All workspaces pass.
